product_description: An 18-agent AI marketing OS that replaces traditional marketing agencies. Strategy, content planning, scripting, carousel design, trend research, competitor analysis — all from one dashboard, powered by AI.
phase: Phase 1 — Testing on 4 brands, building proof
business_type: AI Marketing OS — currently services model, future SaaS
brand_brief: OffGrid Creatives AI is the product page for Grid Control. Unlike ASKGauravAI (personal brand), this page is about the product — what it does, what it produces, who it's for. Gaurav is still the face (founder showing what he built), but the focus is on Grid Control's capabilities and results, not the personal journey.
unique_tension: Every AI tool gives you suggestions. Grid Control gives you deliverables.
language: English ONLY. Global market. No Hinglish.
audience: D2C founders spending ₹15-50k/month on agencies and getting Canva calendars
Small brand owners doing their own marketing with no data or system
Agency owners who want to scale output without hiring more people
Solopreneurs who want their own marketing system, not another tool to learn
Marketing managers at startups looking for AI-powered workflow
not_for_audience: Enterprise companies with existing marketing teams of 20+
People looking for free AI tools
market: Global. Pricing in both INR and USD.

content_model.pillar: 1 YouTube long-form (10-12 min) per week — product demos, system walkthroughs, client results
content_model.derivatives: Shorts/Reels (dashboard clips, deliverable reveals), carousels (agent breakdowns, before/after), LinkedIn (product positioning), X threads (feature walkthroughs)
content_model.on_camera: Gaurav as founder showing the product. Mix talking head + heavy screen recordings of dashboard.
content_model.tone: Confident product demo. Not salesy. 'Let me show you what this does' energy.

tone_of_voice: Product-confident founder. Shows, doesn't sell. Uses real deliverables as proof. Technical enough to be credible, accessible enough for non-coders. English only.
visual_aesthetic: Dashboard screenshots, PDF deliverable reveals, clean product UI. Same palette as ASKGauravAI for brand consistency.

core_agents: Ad Strategist (Meta/X funnels — when budget confirmed)

what_grid_control_delivers: 30-day content calendar (every post mapped to funnel stage)
Full scripts with hooks, body, close, platform directions
Trend intelligence (what's working in your category right now)
Competitor analysis (what your rivals are doing that works)

content_system_setup.description: Brand profile + voice profile + 90-day strategy + 30-day calendar + 10 scripts + 4 carousels

monthly_content_retainer.description: Trend research → calendar → 20 scripts → 8 carousels → delivered monthly

strategy_session_90min.description: Strategy Agent pre-run + Zoom walkthrough + PDF after

brand_voice_dna.description: Brand Guardian voice profiling → voice bible document

script_pack.description: 20 scripts/month with hooks, CTAs, platform versions

trend_intelligence_brief.description: Weekly/bi-weekly trend report for your niche

full_agency_replacement.description: Everything: strategy + calendar + scripts + carousels + trends + reporting

phase_2_product.saas: Client dashboard login. Self-serve. After 2 months testing.
phase_2_product.white_label: Agencies run Grid Control under their brand.
phase_2_product.cohort: 4-week live. Teach while running Grid Control.

brands_running_on_grid_control: OffGrid Creatives AI (this brand — Grid Control product)
Third Gen Tribe (fashion — on hold until Month 2)

content_rules.real_data_mandate: All content backed by real scraped data. No generic claims.
content_rules.show_dont_sell: Show deliverables, show dashboard, show results. Let the product speak.
content_rules.approval_gate: Every output → pending_approval/. Approved manually → approved/.
content_rules.week_1: Product introduction. Show capabilities. No pricing CTA yet.

what_to_never_say: Overpromise ('replace your entire team in 5 minutes')
Pricing in public posts Week 1 (build curiosity first)
website_status: Build after roadmap complete. Not urgent — OffGrid Creatives AI social pages serve as product presence for now.
